Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "BERKSFOUR-080D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Berks Four v1.1 (Digital Monastery - 2019).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Changed the JMP $C800 instruction at $B03F to be JMP $C09A instead to skip the trainer menu
